payload.note: recovery context mismatch resolved via ownership guard; running verification evidence

payload.summary: Evidence reissue only: verified scene implementation acceptance with focused unit tests and production build; no source changes in this recovery turn.

commands_run.summary: 3 test files passed; 7 tests passed; non-fatal Three.js multiple instance warning observed.
tsc and vite build completed; 37 modules transformed; non-fatal Vite chunk-size warning observed.

acceptance_criteria_covered.criterion: port and bus scenario packages load from JSON with manifest, road network, actors, resources, archetype defaults, and flow template indexes validated
world/navigation supports waypoint movement, road-rule actor filtering, priority, and stop-point event emission
R3F scene renders roads, zones, actors, resources, status colors, and five camera modes without depending on source paths

required_rework_items_addressed: missing acceptance evidence for scene scenario loading
missing acceptance evidence for world/navigation behavior
missing acceptance evidence for R3F presentation and camera modes
rework.delta: No code change required; recovery turn supplied concrete runtime command evidence after ownership guard confirmed dev-scene still owns AVBS-SCENE-001.

known_risks: The provided recovery briefing was bound to task (idle); continued using event-derived kanban state plus ownership guard and the active AVBS-SCENE-001 briefing.
Vitest emitted a non-fatal Three.js multiple-instance warning.
Vite emitted a non-fatal chunk-size warning.
